title: Advances in negotiations between the United States and Iran impact global markets
summary: Optimism about a possible peace deal eases geopolitical tension and moves stocks, oil, and bonds.

title: SpaceX grabs headlines with its stock market debut and growth prospects
summary: SpaceX begins trading with strong gains, attracting analysis and expectations about future debt issuances.

title: Keir Starmer resigns as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom
summary: The resignation of the Labour leader opens up the party leadership contest and creates movements in British markets.

title: Mubadala Capital launches takeover bid for Pierre et Vacances
summary: The share of the French tourism group soars after the acquisition proposal from the Abu Dhabi sovereign fund.

title: Visteon shares soar amid market expectations
summary: The automotive components manufacturer experiences an intraday rise without an official corporate announcement.

title: Jefferies downgrades Belimo due to high valuation
summary: The Swiss actuator manufacturer loses ground after the investment bank's warning about its stock price, close to all-time highs.

title: Synthomer accelerates operations in second quarter due to Iranian disruption
summary: The British chemical company benefits from the difficulties of competitors affected by the conflict in the Middle East.

title: CRH negotiates purchase of US construction company Arcosa for $8 billion
summary: The Irish building materials company seeks to expand in the US with the acquisition of the Dallas-based group.

title: Hedge funds resume selling global equities
summary: After a period of buying, hedge funds become net sellers of stocks for the first time in five weeks.

title: EasyJet rejects Castlelake acquisition offer valued at €5.4 billion
summary: The low-cost airline considers that the private equity firm's offer undervalues the company.

title: Can Roblox recover after falling more than 36% this year?
summary: Analysts debate the outlook for the gaming platform after its stock market crash in 2026.

title: A Vanguard index fund could turn $450 per month into a portfolio of over $900,000
summary: The analysis shows the potential of systematic investing in a diversified Vanguard fund over the long term.

title: Getty Images shares surge nearly 140%
summary: The sudden upward movement occurs without a clear corporate announcement, capturing investors' attention.

title: Eiffage falls after negotiations to acquire the Warnow tunnel
summary: The talks about the potential purchase of the tunnel in Germany weigh on the French construction company's stock.

title: China imposes restrictions on US companies in response to the Pentagon
summary: Beijing restricts trade with US rare earth companies amid trade and technological tensions.

title: Kevin Warsh pushes to eliminate the Fed's forward guidance
summary: The new Federal Reserve chairman creates uncertainty in markets by suggesting changes to the central bank's communication.

title: The Ibex 35 hesitates at highs and edges towards 19,400 points
summary: The Spanish index approaches its historical records dragged down by global uncertainty and the strength of some stocks.

title: Lululemon expands its presence in India and reports mixed results
summary: The sportswear brand opens stores in India in partnership with Tata CLiQ and reports an increase in sales with lower profits.

title: Venture capital bets on physical and enterprise artificial intelligence
summary: Seedcamp raises $320 million for physical AI and Bain Capital uses AI replicas to evaluate acquisition targets.

title: Conflict in the Middle East drives defense investment and affects construction
summary: The war in the region diverts capital towards military technology while small construction companies suffer the impact of the conflict.
